notes: Known Atari ST copy-protection and packer byte signatures. Pattern bytes are hex strings. Mask bytes: FF=must match, 00=any byte. iOffset=-1 means search entire sector.

signatures.name: Rob Northen Copylock
signatures.notes: LINK A6,#0 opcode at offset 0x1E in bootsector. Characteristic Copylock entry.

signatures.name: Orion Sly Packer
signatures.notes: BRA.W + NOP at start of bootsector. First byte 0x60 (BRA), byte 3-4 = 0x4E71 (NOP).

signatures.name: ULTRAPACK signature
signatures.notes: ASCII string 'ULTRAPACK' anywhere in the bootsector.

signatures.name: ICE Packer
signatures.notes: ASCII 'ICE!' followed by 0x00 — ICE packer header marker.

signatures.name: Atari ST BPB boot marker
signatures.notes: BRA.W opcode at byte 0 — valid boot entry, first byte 0x60 any offset.
